subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-05-23 in Tiberias
subcodes.first_line: Life, life--let us have more life! Let us have the life of the spirit, a life which is a collective center of the beneficial forces
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love, @purpose of religion in the world (personal and social), @equality of men and women, @priestcraft, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past
